## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential AI-driven solutions for GWL Realty Advisors' vacancy issues and marketing needs.](https://fathom.video/share/Hqv2dWhVDest3t3shTDnCqusYtVPu4V3?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GWL faces competitive market challenges, seeking AI to augment marketing without increasing spend](https://fathom.video/share/Hqv2dWhVDest3t3shTDnCqusYtVPu4V3?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [GrowthX's content-focused solutions don't immediately align with GWL's property vacancy problems](https://fathom.video/share/Hqv2dWhVDest3t3shTDnCqusYtVPu4V3?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
  - [LLM discovery optimization could be relevant, but overall fit/need/urgency doesn't match GrowthX's typical client profile](https://fathom.video/share/Hqv2dWhVDest3t3shTDnCqusYtVPu4V3?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
  - [GrowthX's services (12-month tracks, 12K+/mo) target long-term, high-conviction engagements with clear ROI](https://fathom.video/share/Hqv2dWhVDest3t3shTDnCqusYtVPu4V3?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

## Topics

### GWL's Current Challenges

  - [Struggling with property vacancies across portfolio](https://fathom.video/share/Hqv2dWhVDest3t3shTDnCqusYtVPu4V3?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [Highly competitive market environment](https://fathom.video/share/Hqv2dWhVDest3t3shTDnCqusYtVPu4V3?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [Desire to innovate and get ahead of competitors](https://fathom.video/share/Hqv2dWhVDest3t3shTDnCqusYtVPu4V3?tab=summary&timestamp=28.0)
  - [Seeking AI solutions to augment marketing team without increasing spend](https://fathom.video/share/Hqv2dWhVDest3t3shTDnCqusYtVPu4V3?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)
  - [Limited internal AI expertise (Sooraj as the youngest/only AI-knowledgeable team member)](https://fathom.video/share/Hqv2dWhVDest3t3shTDnCqusYtVPu4V3?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)

### GrowthX's Typical Client Profile

  - [Focus on thought leadership content for brand audience building](https://fathom.video/share/Hqv2dWhVDest3t3shTDnCqusYtVPu4V3?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
  - [Often B2B clients, some B2C with e-commerce angles](https://fathom.video/share/Hqv2dWhVDest3t3shTDnCqusYtVPu4V3?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
  - [Clients with clear growth targets and budget-to-revenue connections](https://fathom.video/share/Hqv2dWhVDest3t3shTDnCqusYtVPu4V3?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Long-term engagements (12-month content tracks)](https://fathom.video/share/Hqv2dWhVDest3t3shTDnCqusYtVPu4V3?tab=summary&timestamp=358.0)
  - [Starting at $12K/month, sometimes significantly higher](https://fathom.video/share/Hqv2dWhVDest3t3shTDnCqusYtVPu4V3?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Value proposition: Equivalent to hiring 3+ team members, faster execution](https://fathom.video/share/Hqv2dWhVDest3t3shTDnCqusYtVPu4V3?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)

### Potential Content Strategies

  - [Rent vs. buy market analysis/education](https://fathom.video/share/Hqv2dWhVDest3t3shTDnCqusYtVPu4V3?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [Persona-targeted content for various stages of renting journey](https://fathom.video/share/Hqv2dWhVDest3t3shTDnCqusYtVPu4V3?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [Programmatic content scaling for improved search engine rankings](https://fathom.video/share/Hqv2dWhVDest3t3shTDnCqusYtVPu4V3?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Property-specific content to drive more views](https://fathom.video/share/Hqv2dWhVDest3t3shTDnCqusYtVPu4V3?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)

### LLM Discovery Optimization

  - [Potential to optimize content for LLM bot discovery (e.g., ChatGPT)](https://fathom.video/share/Hqv2dWhVDest3t3shTDnCqusYtVPu4V3?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [Focus on key questions potential renters might ask](https://fathom.video/share/Hqv2dWhVDest3t3shTDnCqusYtVPu4V3?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
  - [Create long-form content (blogs, articles) addressing these questions](https://fathom.video/share/Hqv2dWhVDest3t3shTDnCqusYtVPu4V3?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
  - [GrowthX offers optimization and traction tracking for LLM discovery](https://fathom.video/share/Hqv2dWhVDest3t3shTDnCqusYtVPu4V3?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)

### Fit Assessment

  - [GrowthX prioritizes fit, need, and urgency in client selection](https://fathom.video/share/Hqv2dWhVDest3t3shTDnCqusYtVPu4V3?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
  - [Real estate clients not typical, making ROI less clear](https://fathom.video/share/Hqv2dWhVDest3t3shTDnCqusYtVPu4V3?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [GWL's exploratory stage doesn't align with GrowthX's high-conviction engagement model](https://fathom.video/share/Hqv2dWhVDest3t3shTDnCqusYtVPu4V3?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [Limited real estate experience impacts GrowthX's ability to confidently serve GWL's needs](https://fathom.video/share/Hqv2dWhVDest3t3shTDnCqusYtVPu4V3?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)

## Next Steps

  - [No immediate collaboration planned between GWL and GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/Hqv2dWhVDest3t3shTDnCqusYtVPu4V3?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [Sooraj to continue exploring AI solutions more tailored to real estate/vacancy issues](https://fathom.video/share/Hqv2dWhVDest3t3shTDnCqusYtVPu4V3?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [Kyle open to future discussions if clearer alignment emerges](https://fathom.video/share/Hqv2dWhVDest3t3shTDnCqusYtVPu4V3?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
  - [Sooraj has Kyle's email for potential future contact](https://fathom.video/share/Hqv2dWhVDest3t3shTDnCqusYtVPu4V3?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
